personal.name: Pavel Goncharov
personal.title: Full-stack developer
personal.introduction: I'm Pavel Goncharov, a determined and motivated full-stack developer focused on modern web technologies. I specialize in taking products from 0 to 1, building complete solutions from concept to deployment. I'm ready to jump on great opportunities and bring passion and expertise to every project.

1.title: SmartFace App
1.description: Full-stack application built with React and Node.js + Express.js on the backend. Features user authentication, database integration with PostgreSQL, and modern UI components.
1.detailedDescription: The frontend app was built with React and Vite, using npm packages like tsparticles and parallax-tilt to make the visuals more appealing. RBAC for users and guests. For the backend app, Node, Express, bcrypt, and Knex are the main tools. Knex enables to connect to a database and build queries. Here I first found out how to use transactions in db. PostgreSQL with two tables also came in handy.

challenges.3: Handling user registration and login flows

2.title: Robofriends
2.description: React application that demonstrates fundamental React concepts including hooks, components, and one-way data flow. Features API integration and search functionality.
2.detailedDescription: This project challenged me to understand the fundamentals of React, its hooks, reactivity, components and one way data flow. An api was connected through a URL, I understood how to use fetch api and the idea of a callback function, as well as chaining thenables. The searching algorithm included Javascript DOM accessing methods and passing arguments as properties.

features.1: Integration with external services using an API

challenges.0: Understanding React hooks and state management

3.title: Unidesign Layout
3.description: Custom layout built completely from scratch as an exercise. Focuses on responsive design principles and modern CSS techniques.
3.detailedDescription: This layout was build completely from scratch as an exercise. Not mobile-friendly initially, but later improved with responsive design principles.

4.title: Portfolio Website
4.description: Modern portfolio website built with Next.js, featuring responsive design, blog functionality, and contact form integration.
4.detailedDescription: A modern portfolio website showcasing my work and skills. Built with Next.js for optimal performance and SEO.

6.title: Osbias - Cognitive journal
6.description: Text editor that combines structured thinking frameworks with AI-powered assistance to help users become better thinkers and more intentional humans.
6.detailedDescription: A service that bridges personal knowledge management and reasoning templates. Features sophisticated journal editing, AI-powered assistance, thinking frameworks, goal management, and basic publishing capabilities. Built with 15+ API endpoints, clear documentation, and advanced features.

features.0: Sophisticated CodeMirror-based journal editor with framework-guided writing
features.1: AI chat integration for cognitive assistance and bias checking
features.2: Idea validation and paraphrasing capabilities powered by AI
features.3: Create and apply thinking frameworks (First Principles, OODA Loop, etc.)
features.4: Goal management with actionable items and progress tracking
features.5: Publish entries to public feed or to your personal API endpoint
features.6: Export work in multiple formats (txt, md, zip) for external use
features.7: Template systems for consistent thinking patterns
features.9: Rate limiting and security features (rbac, hashing)
features.10: Keyboard shortcuts and modern light and dark-themed UI
features.12: SQLite database with proper migrations and production-ready infrastructure
features.13: Redux state management and advanced React hooks

challenges.0: Defining product features and creating effective roadmap
challenges.2: Building scalable full-stack architecture with Next.js
challenges.5: Optimizing performance with advanced React hooks and SSR
challenges.6: Managing complex state with Redux across the application

7.title: GuildGrad - Language Edtech
7.description: A service that brings the power of technology to english learners. It combines courses, community clubs and language practice in one place.
7.detailedDescription: GuildGrad is more than a platform — it's a living, breathing community of learners who believe that language grows through connection. It's goal is to build the environment in which everyone thrives by default

ThankYou.title: Message Received!
ThankYou.message1: Thank you for reaching out! I've received your message and will get back to you as soon as possible.
ThankYou.message2: I typically respond within 24 hours, so you can expect to hear from me soon. In the meantime, feel free to explore more of my work or check out my latest blog posts.
